role_definitions.agent_control: Modules that govern agent lifecycle, orchestration, and dispatch
role_definitions.semantic_processing: Modules for token encoding, ontology mapping, and meaning extraction
role_definitions.reasoning_engine: Modules implementing inference, logical deduction, and probabilistic reasoning
role_definitions.utility_support: Stateless helper modules providing shared services
role_definitions.safety_guard: Modules enforcing constraints, auditing, and integrity checks
role_definitions.math_operator: Modules performing deterministic numeric and algebraic computation
